name: OCONEE FINANCIAL CORP
summary: PART I . General Oconee Financial Corporation (Oconee), a registered bank holding company, was incorporated under the laws of the State of Georgia in 1998 and commenced operations by acquiring 100% of the outstanding shares of Oconee State Bank (the Bank) effective January 1, 1999. All of Oconees activities are currently conducted by its wholly owned subsidiary, the Bank, which was incorporated as a bank under the laws of the State of Georgia in 1959. At December 31, 2011, the Banks total assets...
